main.text: The CPI is a prime indicator for the health of the economy. The traders are holding their breath: how will the Canadian Dollar react to the report’s release?
main.head-tip: How to use it in your trading:
main.tip: Canadian Gross Domestic Product forecast is currently at 0.1%. A higher that projected results may boost Canadian economy.
main.star: *The amount to be credited to the balance in case of successful investment. The offer is valid from 12:30 to 14:30 GMT.
